rows.subject: [Apollo] [Email] [>>] Re: VLMs in identity
rows.body_preview: Hi Nemanja, If you end up evaluating tools in this space, Roboflow is often in the mix for CV workflows. The main cases where Encord tends to win are when the data stops being “just images”: liveness video (temporal QA matters), document-heavy flows (OCR plus review), or when security/compliance and
